/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -fno-semantic-interposition -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -fno-lifetime-dse -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wno-nonnull -Wno-class-memaccess -Wno-redundant-move -Wno-pessimizing-move -Wno-noexcept-type -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wno-comment -Wno-misleading-indentation -Wctad-maybe-unsupported -g "CMakeFiles/asc-compiler.dir/main.cpp.o" -o asc  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib ../../lib/Driver/libascDriver.a ../../lib/Parse/libascParse.a ../../lib/Lex/libascLex.a ../../lib/CodeGen/libascCodeGen.a ../../lib/Analysis/libascAnalysis.a ../../lib/HIR/libascHIR.a ../../lib/Sema/libascSema.a
